visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with a mustache, wearing a dark suit and tie. He is in a dimly lit, dark environment. The audio begins with a sharp, metallic click, like a gun being cocked, followed by a soft, rustling sound. He looks down and to his right with a serious expression as he appears to handle a small, dark object. In the upper left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in white. The camera remains steady, maintaining a tight focus on the man's face and upper body. The man continues to look down, his expression intense. Another person's hand, holding a dark, cylindrical object, enters the frame from the right and moves towards the man. The background remains dark and indistinct. The "风行网" text is still present. The camera angle shifts slightly, revealing more of the second person, who is also in a suit. The first man looks up slightly, his gaze now directed at the person approaching him. The second person, wearing glasses, brings the object, which appears to be a small case or device, closer to the first man.
